description: Upgrade plan to migrate project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to 21, Spring Boot to 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, and migrate javax.* to jakarta.* namespace if needed. Update Maven/Gradle build configuration to target Java 21. Ensure all dependencies are compatible with the target versions.
tasks.taskSummary: Upgraded Java from 8 to 21 and Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to 3.4.5. Migrated javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces in Photo.java. Updated Java idioms in PhotoServiceImpl.java, DetailController.java, and PhotoFileController.java. Build passes, unit tests pass.
